calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing And Of Non Appearance
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Reported by Brenda Crow, CSR#10503 , 415-551-0330, bcrow@sftc.org (514)

Jennifer Myers, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s)Jonathan Huang,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,237.91
Pre-Judgment Interest:
Attorney's Fees: $800.00
Costs: $615.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,653.81
Judgment signed in open court.
